info.name: Pepper Escrow Internal API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Pepper Escrow platform — internal use by platform operators and developers.

## Base URL
Replace `{{base_url}}` with your server URL (e.g. `http://localhost:8000`).

## Authentication
- **API Endpoints**: Pass the API token as a Bearer token: `Authorization: Bearer {{api_key}}`
- **Admin Web Endpoints**: Session-based — call `POST /login` first with email + password
- **Merchant Web Endpoints**: Session-based — call `POST /merchant/login` first

## Variables
Set these in the Postman environment:
- `base_url` — Server URL (e.g. `http://localhost:8000`)
- `api_key` — API token from merchant dashboard
- `email` / `password` — Admin login (seeded: admin@pepperescrow.com / password)
- `merchant_email` / `merchant_password` — Merchant login
- `appid` — App ID from API token
- `referenceid` — Transaction reference for testing

## Gateway Webhooks (Public — no auth)
These endpoints are called by payment gateways (Paystack, Flutterwave, Stripe, SeerBit). They do NOT require an API key.

request.description:
Creates an escrow transaction record without generating a payment link.

Supports `transaction_type` param to specify a type slug (e.g. "escrow", "deposit", "milestone"). If omitted, defaults to the merchant's first active type.

body.raw:
{
  "appid": "{{appid}}",
  "referenceid": "{{referenceid}}",
  "user_email": "user@example.com",
  "amount": "250000",
  "country": "NG",
  "currency": "NGN",
  "customer_email": "customer@example.com",
  "merchant_email": "{{merchant_email}}",
  "description": "Payment for services",
  "customer_account_number": "0123456789",
  "merchant_account_number": "9876543210",
  "customer_bank_code": "011",
  "merchant_bank_code": "011",
  "customer_name": "John Doe",
  "merchant_name": "Jane Smith",
  "customer_phone": "08012345678",
  "merchant_phone": "08087654321",
  "peppfees": "3750",
  "startdate": "2026-07-01",
  "enddate": "2026-07-30",
  "transfer_reference_id": null,
  "transaction_type": "escrow",
  "metadata": {
    "order_id": "ORD-001",
    "notes": "Rush delivery"
  }
}

request.description: Creates an escrow transaction and generates a payment link via the configured gateway. Returns `payment_url` in the response.

body.raw:
{
  "appid": "{{appid}}",
  "referenceid": "REF-CARD-001",
  "user_email": "user@example.com",
  "amount": "150000",
  "country": "NG",
  "currency": "NGN",
  "customer_email": "customer@example.com",
  "merchant_email": "{{merchant_email}}",
  "description": "Escrow with card payment",
  "merchant_account_number": "9876543210",
  "merchant_bank_code": "011",
  "customer_name": "John Doe",
  "merchant_name": "Jane Smith",
  "customer_phone": "08012345678",
  "merchant_phone": "08087654321",
  "peppfees": "2250",
  "startdate": "2026-07-01",
  "enddate": "2026-07-30",
  "callback_url": "https://yourapp.com/callback",
  "transfer_reference_id": null,
  "transaction_type": "escrow",
  "metadata": {
    "order_id": "ORD-002"
  }
}

request.description: Generate or re-generate a payment link for an existing transaction.
Stops/flags a transaction. Prevents release until resolved.
Releases funds to the merchant.
Request a fulfillment date extension.
Accept or reject a previously requested extension. Set action to "accept" or "refuse".
Approve or reject a refund request. Set action to "accept" to process via gateway or "refuse" to reject.
List transactions filtered by status. Values: Open, Pending, PaymentPending, Flagged, Fulfilled, Released, Closed.
Get a single transaction by its reference ID.
Report a new dispute. Supports file upload (multipart/form-data).

formdata.value: Customer did not receive the item

body.raw:
{
  "appid": "{{appid}}",
  "dispute_referenceid": "DSP-001",
  "referenceid": "{{referenceid}}",
  "customer_comment": "I want a full refund",
  "merchant_comment": "We can offer a partial refund",
  "arbitrator_comment": "Both parties should compromise",
  "resolution_desc": "Hearing held, decision pending",
  "sitting_date": "2026-07-10",
  "next_sitting_date": "2026-07-20"
}

request.description: Returns the bank codes JSON from the assets data file.
Receives DVA/VAF credit notifications from gateways.
Receives transfer status updates from gateways (Paystack transfer.success, Flutterwave transfer.completed).
Seeds 6 default transaction types: escrow, deposit, withdrawal, subscription, milestone, instant. Attaches default 2.5% commission rules.
Preview commission calculation for a given amount and transaction type.
Assign a virtual account (DVA/VAF) to a transaction. Creates a new one if none exists for this customer.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Premium Plan",
  "slug": "premium",
  "description": "Monthly premium subscription",
  "amount": 50000,
  "currency": "NGN",
  "billing_frequency": "monthly",
  "billing_interval": 1,
  "trial_days": 7,
  "features": {"max_transactions": 1000, "api_access": true, "priority_support": true},
  "is_active": true
}
